title: Scenario Planning Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger scenario planning foundations judgment so strategy work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Scenario Planning Foundations is a leverage point inside strategy. It supports the broader goal of vision, positioning, competitive analysis, and strategic planning.
coreConcepts: Scenario Planning Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good scenario planning foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Scenario Planning Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
